com.ea.nfs2014.bv.title: Need for Speed: No Limits 레이싱
com.ea.nfs2014.bv.notes:
Here's what to expect from this update:

- Ronin is out with their guard down and a Porsche Mission R, What could go wrong? Find out in Typhoon!
- Get your crew ready to complete missions and claim the new LAND ROVER Range Rover Sport SVR!
- Celebrate Independence with the Patriot Wrap from the Crew Stash, and unlock the Loud-n-Proud Wrap for free!
- 4 Flashbacks!
- Fixed a few bugs, for more information check Patch Notes.

We hope you enjoy the new update!

com.nguyenvh.holeio.title: Hole.io
com.nguyenvh.holeio.notes:
The hole keeps growing, and so does the experience.
 
• NEW LOOK, SAME HUNGER - A redesigned in-game screen built for clarity, so nothing stands between you and your next meal.
• MAP PROGRESS - Updated visuals and tutorials make tracking your path through each map smoother than ever.
• EVERY SCREEN, PERFECTLY FITTED - UI improvements across all devices for a seamless experience wherever you play.
 
Swallow it all. Update now!

com.gameloft.asphalt9.title: 아스팔트 레전드
com.gameloft.asphalt9.notes:
Welcome to a brand-new update, featuring 2 seasons: AUDI SEASON and RAW CIRCUIT.

New cars!
6 new cars are arriving as we welcome Audi to the Asphalt family!

Sonic 35th Anniversary Spotlight
Long time no see! The Blue Blur returns in time to celebrate Sonic's 35th Anniversary!

Prototype Racing Spotlight
Get behind the wheel of an Audi for the very first time in Asphalt Legends!

Drive Syndicate: Operation Cerberus
The Drive Syndicate returns! Join the Syndicate and race for your latest target:

com.hitwicketgames.cricket.title: Hitwicket™ Cricket Game 2026
com.hitwicketgames.cricket.notes:
New Event
• Team up with up to 4 players in a brand-new co-op event! Complete milestones together and earn exciting rewards.

Improvements & Fixes
• Revamped Player Profile UI for a smoother experience
• Change your Chibi directly from your profile
• Fixed a Daily Deals issue where purchases could use the wrong currency after watching an ad
• Improved currency consistency across the game
• Reduced device heating and improved performance
• Fixed several lag and crash issues
Release notes provided

com.easygames.race.notes:
Race Master goes Top Fuel.
Collect Burning Tires mid-race, complete the Born to Drag event, and unlock cars you won't find anywhere else.

Tire Hunt — grab burning tires scattered across every track
Born to Drag event — progress through nitro-fueled challenges, earn rewards
Exclusive cars: Launcher, Barracuda and Thunder
Limited seasonal shop — new bundles, limited time

One strip. One shot. Full throttle — go.
